name: Gorgias
description: Manage Gorgias (e-commerce helpdesk) tickets, messages, customers, integrations from any AI agent. 10 tools, basic-auth.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Gorgias REST API (per-subdomain).

**Setup**:
1. Log into your Gorgias dashboard at https://YOUR_SUBDOMAIN.gorgias.com → **Settings → REST API**.
2. Click **Add new API Key**. The page shows your **email** (the account email) and a freshly-generated **API key**.
3. Set `GORGIAS_SUBDOMAIN` (just the subdomain part, e.g. `mystore`), `GORGIAS_EMAIL`, `GORGIAS_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: HTTP Basic with `username = ${GORGIAS_EMAIL}` and `password = ${GORGIAS_API_KEY}`. The adapter wires this via BASIC_AUTH.

**Per-tenant baseUrl**: Gorgias is hosted per-subdomain — `https://${GORGIAS_SUBDOMAIN}.gorgias.com/api`. baseUrl uses {{}} substitution at import time.

**Ticket model**: `Ticket → Messages[]`. A ticket is a conversation thread with a customer; each message is one inbound/outbound email/chat/SMS. To reply, POST a new message to the ticket; to close, PUT the ticket with `status: 'closed'`.

**Channels**: Gorgias unifies email, chat, SMS, Instagram DM, Facebook DM, Shopify, voice. `via` field on each message identifies the channel.

**Pagination**: cursor-based. List endpoints return `meta.next_cursor` and `meta.previous_cursor`. Use `cursor` query param for the next page; `limit` controls page size (max 100).

**Search**: the `tickets` endpoint accepts `view_id` to filter by saved view, and various direct filters. For more complex queries use the dedicated `/views/{id}/items` endpoint.

**Rate limits**: 40 req/s per account; 2 concurrent connections. 429 returns `Retry-After` in seconds.

**Out of scope here**: macro CRUD beyond list, rule management, satisfaction surveys, voice call orchestration.

tools.name: gorgias_list_tickets
tools.description: List tickets. Filter by status, channel, assigned user, customer, view. Returns each ticket's id, subject, status, channel, customer, assignee_user, last_message_datetime, created/updated timestamps.

view_id.description: Filter to a saved view's tickets.

tools.name: gorgias_get_ticket
tools.description: Get a single ticket by ID with its meta (does NOT include messages — use gorgias_list_ticket_messages).

tools.name: gorgias_list_ticket_messages
tools.description: List messages on a ticket (the conversation thread). Each message has body_text, body_html, sender, receiver, via (channel), source.

tools.name: gorgias_create_ticket
tools.description: Create a new ticket. Must include at least one message — Gorgias rejects empty tickets. Common pattern: pass `customer.email` + `messages: [{...}]`.

messages.description: Array of message objects with body_text + sender + receiver + channel + via.

tools.name: gorgias_reply_to_ticket
tools.description: Add a reply message to an existing ticket. Pass `body_text` + `sender` (your user) + `receiver` (the customer) + `channel`. Use `via: 'help-center'` to send as outbound.

tools.name: gorgias_update_ticket
tools.description: Update a ticket's status, assignee, tags, custom fields.

tools.name: gorgias_list_customers
tools.description: List customers. Filter by email, external_id. Returns id, email, firstname, lastname, channels (linked accounts).

external_id.description: Exact match on external (Shopify etc.) ID.

tools.name: gorgias_get_customer
tools.description: Get a single customer by ID with full profile and integration data (e.g. Shopify orders count).

tools.name: gorgias_create_customer
tools.description: Create a customer record. Pass at least email + firstname + lastname.

external_id.description: Optional external system ID (Shopify customer ID etc.).

tools.name: gorgias_list_users
tools.description: List agents in your Gorgias workspace (the people on your team — sender IDs for reply messages).
